name: Firefly

attacks.name: Luminous Slime Projectile
attacks.tell: The firefly rises slightly and expels a ball of bright green liquid
attacks.howToAvoid: Stay in lateral movement so that the projectile misses
attacks.notes: The slime globule explodes on contact with the ground, leaving a puddle that can slow or slightly damage

attacks.name: Header
attacks.tell: It emits a flash of light and charges forward with its head
attacks.howToAvoid: Block or walk away; the flash anticipates the onslaught
attacks.notes: Low damage close attack, used if the player is very close

description: A glowing insect that appears at night above the Flooded Zone and Flower Bed, leaving bright materials behind when defeated.
behavior: It spends the night flying high in loose groups and retreats to the house gutters during the day. Its combat pattern is built almost entirely around firing glow from its abdomen.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral until attacked. Once one is angered, nearby fireflies can join the fight quickly.
interactionWithCreatures: It rarely mixes with ground creatures because it fights from the air, but it will retaliate against anything that hits it or presses too close.
strategy: Stabbing remains the big weakness and spicy is a poor choice. Keep enough space to read the shot and avoid pulling the whole group at once.
specialTraits: All of its attacks reduce movement speed.
